form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when favourite; won by 0.5 len at Curragh June 4 over 1408m defeating Dorset with 60.5kg at $1.90. Great chance to make it two for two.

form.formComment: Resuming after a lengthy spell. Only one run when won by a head at Haydock Park July 19 over 1400m defeating Haaderr carrying 60.5kg at $3.30. Won't find this assignment as easy.
